contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: Hotfix submit_contribution crash + regression test
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/252
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/253
  
  Details:
  After removing the submit_contribution approval gate (#251), every submit crashed the brain: 'UnboundLocalError: summary referenced before assignment' (surfaced to the governor as '⚠️ Error: peer closed connection... incomplete chunked read'). Diagnosed from the box journalctl. Root cause: a latent structural bug #251 exposed — the proposal build + 'return json.dumps(proposal)' sat OUTSIDE 'if not approved:', so the execute block was dead code and 'summary' was unbound whenever approved=True. #252: moved the proposal build + _add_pending + return inside 'if not approved:' so edgar.submit_contribution is reached when the gate is off; merged + deployed non-force (HEAD 524b6ac, /health ok). #253: hermetic regression tests over _run_tool('submit_contribution') — gate-off reaches execute + returns success (would have failed pre-#252), gate-on returns pending with summary bound. 572 unit tests pass.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 66.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
